title: Mosvera Composition
description: A use-site assembly: a base template, an ordered list of modifiers, and optional inline overrides. Resolving a composition folds the precedence chain (resolved base ancestry -> base -> modifiers in order -> overrides) via the MEP-0001 merge operation, later-wins. SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0.

$schema.description: Identifies this document as a Mosvera composition of a given version.

id.description: Optional name for this composition, for reference and provenance.

base.description: Reference to the base template. Resolved through its inheritance chain (MEP-0002) before composition. Lowest precedence in the chain.

modifiers.description: Ordered list of modifier references. Order is load-bearing: a modifier later in the list has higher precedence (MEP-0001). The order you write is the order that wins.

overrides.description: Inline aesthetic overrides applied at highest precedence, above all modifiers. Analogous to a CSS style attribute. May use $unset/$revert.
